mapper.sql: id , banner_1 , partnership_img_url_1 , partnership_img_url_2 , partnership_img_url_3 , img_url_1 , img_url_2 , img_url_3 , img_url_4 , img_url_5 , img_url_6 , img_url_7 , img_url_8 , partnership_img_url
mapper.update:
update mlsd_join_investment
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{record.banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url_1 = #{record.partnershipImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url_2 = #{record.partnershipImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url_3 = #{record.partnershipImgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_1 = #{record.imgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_2 = #{record.imgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_3 = #{record.imgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_4 = #{record.imgUrl4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_5 = #{record.imgUrl5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_6 = #{record.imgUrl6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_7 = #{record.imgUrl7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_8 = #{record.imgUrl8,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url = #{record.partnershipImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update mlsd_join_investment
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
banner_1 = #{banner1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url_1 = #{partnershipImgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url_2 = #{partnershipImgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url_3 = #{partnershipImgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_1 = #{imgUrl1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_2 = #{imgUrl2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_3 = #{imgUrl3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_4 = #{imgUrl4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_5 = #{imgUrl5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_6 = #{imgUrl6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_7 = #{imgUrl7,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
img_url_8 = #{imgUrl8,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
partnership_img_url = #{partnershipImgUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id , banner_1 , partnership_img_url_1 , partnership_img_url_2 , partnership_img_url_3 , img_url_1 , img_url_2 , img_url_3 , img_url_4 , img_url_5 , img_url_6 , img_url_7 , img_url_8 , partnership_img_url from mlsd_join_investment where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

select id , banner_1 , partnership_img_url_1 , partnership_img_url_2 , partnership_img_url_3 , img_url_1 , img_url_2 , img_url_3 , img_url_4 , img_url_5 , img_url_6 , img_url_7 , img_url_8 , partnership_img_url from mlsd_join_investment where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
